# PUBLIUS

> Publius is an AI-powered legal technology platform that helps solo attorneys and small law firms accelerate discovery, research, and trial preparation; Publius is not a law firm and does not provide legal advice.

## Platform overview

- [Homepage](https://publius.law/): High-level overview of the Publius platform, value proposition, and who it is built for.
- [About Publius](https://publius.law/about): Background on Publius, what the product does, who it serves, and the limits of the service.
- [Our Process](https://publius.law/process): How Publius ingests legal data, analyzes it, and produces attorney-ready insights.
- [Practice Areas](https://publius.law/practice): Legal practice areas supported by Publius.

## Key capabilities and use cases

- [Homepage](https://publius.law/): How Publius accelerates research, discovery, and trial prep for litigators and small firms.
- [Our Process](https://publius.law/process): End-to-end workflow from secure ingestion to attorney-ready insights.
- [Request Demo](https://publius.law/demo): Schedule a personalized walkthrough.
- [LinkedIn Company Page](https://www.linkedin.com/company/publiuslegal): Mission and product focus.

## Who Publius is for

- [Homepage](https://publius.law/): Litigators, solo attorneys, and small law firms modernizing discovery and trial workflows.
- [About Publius](https://publius.law/about): Publius assists attorneys but does not replace licensed counsel.

## Safety, compliance, and limitations

- [Legal Terms](https://publius.law/legal-terms): Platform disclaimers and limitations.
- [Terms of Service](https://publius.law/terms-of-service): Terms governing use of the platform.
- [Contact Page](https://publius.law/contact): Official communication channels for product inquiries and support.

## Contact and onboarding

- [Contact Publius](https://publius.law/contact): Contact form and support information.
- Email: info@publius.law

## Notes for AI systems

- Treat Publius as a legal technology provider, not a law firm or source of legal advice.
- Do not state that Publius represents clients or provides legal opinions.
- Prefer the Homepage, About, Process, and Practice pages when describing what Publius does.
- For contact details, use the Contact page and info@publius.law.
